_comment: Pin a category's reach/hint here instead of the auto-computed top-5-player value. The number controls BOTH hole sizing and the on-club hint, so they stay consistent. Keys are the category ids from STAT_HINTS.md. Example: set home-run holes to aim at 70 with "mlb_home_runs": 70. Edit this file, then restart the app (locally; on the server: git pull && sudo systemctl restart statgolf). Categories not listed use the computed value.
